MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank NA is present. Represented by Erin Carrig .
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Frederick C. Bowles is present.
Attorney Aaron A. Farmer representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Philip Keith, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of MAR-19-2012 remains on calendar.(501/JPT)
